timeline.title: Founder
timeline.description: Founder and lead consultant at Don't Panic Consulting AB, a generalist consulting firm. Key deliverables include: podcast editing for RikaTillsammans (Sweden's #1 personal finance podcast, 40,000+ listeners), self-hosted Discourse forum deployment, website design and development, IT infrastructure (hosting, email servers), Airtable database solutions, social media channel management, podcast launch consulting (4 clients), individual and team coaching, and office tech solutions. Our approach: stay calm, adapt quickly, and solve whatever problem the client brings.

timeline.title: Full Stack Developer
timeline.description: Graduated from Technigo's 32-week intensive Full Stack Developer bootcamp. Curriculum covered JavaScript (ES6), TypeScript, React, HTML5, CSS3, and server-side programming with Node.js. Agile methodology throughout with weekly sprint planning, check-ins, demos, and reflections. Extensive pair-programming and mob-programming.

timeline.title: Product Marketing Specialist
timeline.description: Product Marketing Specialist at Refined, the leading Atlassian Marketplace site-builder for Confluence, Jira, and JSM (4,000+ customers in 100+ countries). Authored technical blog content including migration guides for Confluence Cloud. Developed product marketing strategies for cloud migration tooling and contributed to product positioning.

timeline.title: Communications Manager
timeline.description: Communications Manager at Jurio, a Copenhagen-based online legal consultation platform. Managed the content calendar and ensured consistent blog publication. Held overall SEO accountability including technical SEO and performance reporting. Oversaw PPC campaigns on Meta, Bing, and Google Ads with focus on copywriting, keyword analysis, and budget management. Led a team of 3-4 law students. Crafted targeted email campaigns and executed affiliate partnerships with influencers and podcasts.

timeline.title: Communication Professional
timeline.description: Communication Professional at Polynom Investment AB, a Swedish venture capital firm investing in European scaleups with approximately 80 portfolio companies. Responsible for investor relations and strategy for acquiring new investors. Co-managed the annual 'Polynomdagen' event with 220 participants. Set up and managed investor databases, implemented e-signature solutions and digitized contract processes, built automated onboarding funnels, launched an internal investor podcast, and established an investor council. Started as a consultant in 2020, transitioning to full-time in February 2022.

timeline.title: Project Manager
timeline.description: Project Manager for the #FUEL1Million initiative at Project FUEL, an award-winning international education nonprofit founded by Deepak Ramola (listed among the world's top 100 innovations). Co-created a global campaign to collect 1 million life lessons, transforming them into educational material for diverse learners worldwide.

timeline.title: Executive Assistant
timeline.description: Executive Assistant at RikaTillsammans, Sweden's #1 personal finance podcast (ranked #5 on Apple Podcasts Sweden Business charts, 458+ episodes, 40,000+ listeners). Managed social media channels, produced and edited podcast content, and handled various operational tasks including office setup.

timeline.title: Youth Coach
timeline.description: Youth coach supporting a teenager through an action plan mandated by social services. Responsibilities included coordinating recreational activities, providing mental health support, and offering educational guidance.

timeline.title: Raoul Wallenberg Academy Leadership Camp
timeline.description: Intensive leadership development program focused on ethical leadership and social responsibility.
achievements: Built network of socially conscious leaders

timeline.title: Co-Creator
timeline.description: Co-creator at Emprogage AB, an early-stage venture focused on employee engagement solutions.

timeline.title: Editor-in-Chief
timeline.description: Editor-in-chief and writer at Redaktionen, a media platform for young people to express themselves and distribute content through youth-relevant channels.

timeline.title: Host
timeline.description: Creator and host of 'Ett Samtal' (A Conversation), a Swedish-language podcast featuring thoughtful conversations with people I admire on topics that matter. The project served as both a learning experience in podcast production and a platform for creating value through meaningful dialogue.

timeline.title: Internship on project management
timeline.description: Project management internship involving multiple projects in and around the organization, including the Visual Viking Academy — a training program in visual thinking and graphical recording.

timeline.title: Assistant Content Manager
timeline.description: Part of the Lund team at World Values Initiative Sweden. Developed digital presence by creating valuable content for the organization's audience.

timeline.title: Micro Expressions Training Tool
timeline.description: Specialized training in micro expressions recognition and analysis for improved communication and understanding.
achievements: Applied skills in professional and personal contexts

timeline.title: Subtle Expressions, Expert Level
timeline.description: Advanced certification in subtle expressions analysis, building on micro expressions foundation with expert-level skills.
achievements: Achieved expert level in subtle expressions analysis

timeline.title: Host
timeline.description: Creator and host of 'Lärdom för Dagen' (Learning of the Day), a daily vlog series running almost every weekday. Each 5-minute episode explored a recent learning or insight, published on Facebook and YouTube.

timeline.title: Bachelor's degree
timeline.description: Bachelor's degree at Lund University, one of Scandinavia's most prestigious universities (consistently ranked among the world's top 100). Active in student life and financial education.
details: The program's association as master of finances.

timeline.title: Project manager
timeline.description: Organized a side event for the theatre show 'Den e Vi' at Malmö City Theatre. Booked a live band, produced a short documentary about the city, and designed room decorations for the event.

timeline.title: Assistant Project Manager
timeline.description: Assistant Project Manager for 'Hemmaplan', a youth sports initiative using basketball as a tool to get young kids more physically active. Identified potential collaborations and submitted funding applications during the project's startup phase.

timeline.title: Project Management I
timeline.description: A basic course in project management.

timeline.title: Administrator
timeline.company: What do you need help with today buddy?
timeline.description: ”What do you need help with today buddy?” Is a Facebook group with over 40.000 members. The mission is to create a kinder and helping forum online. https://www.facebook.com/groups/whatdoyouneedhelpwithtodaybuddy/

timeline.title: Project Manager
timeline.description: Project Manager at Samtalsaktivisterna (The Conversational Activists), originally a Reach For Change-funded project. Played a key role in transitioning from project to NGO, building the organization from the ground up. Responsibilities expanded from project management and administration to include personnel management, sales, planning, and leading multiple projects.

timeline.title: Board Member
timeline.description: Board member at Sveriges Elevkårer (Swedish Student Unions).

timeline.title: CFO and co-founder
timeline.description: Co-founded HipWheels UF through Ung Företagsamhet (Junior Achievement Sweden) during the final year at Bladins Gymnasium. Sold hoverboards and achieved a turnover of almost 100,000 SEK in the first 5 months.

timeline.title: Gymnasium
timeline.description: International Baccalaureate-style program taught entirely in English.
details: Board member of the United Student Unions of Malmö
Initiator of the Soccer team and Chess club. Received the honorary 'Bladiner of the Year' award for outstanding contributions.
